artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2024-10-03
artifacts.excerpt: The Jones Act protects us from this port strike, by ensuring that none of our domestic supply lines rely in any way on our ports. Our congress is wise indeed.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2022-10-17
artifacts.excerpt:
Today: 
Wife: Have you heard about [person we know]?
Me: No...
Wife: If I told you he had 50 million dollars, how would you think he got it?
Me (guessing): He hacked a crypto exchange?
Wife: You are correct.

Took in all the public info. I do not know what has happened, let alone what is happening. 

Every time I try to put the pieces together, they don't add up unless there is something big we don't know. Does not make sense.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2024-06-30
artifacts.excerpt: You know how good @kaibudde is? How hard he works? The man is nuts. We were teammates, he repeatedly won PTs by doing more work than I did, then decided I wasn't a good enough teammate and left. I'm still in awe.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2024-02-08
artifacts.excerpt: As someone who had early access, I can say that Gemini Ultra is damn impressive. When it is good, it is excellent, and this includes the most common queries, especially learning and looking up facts. I've switched to it as my default LLM. More details in my weekly post. https://t.co/rhbc21ObpB
